Symfony Polyfill / Intl: Normalizer =================================== This component provides a fallback implementation for the [`Normalizer`](https://php.net/Normalizer) class provided by the [Intl](https://php.net/intl) extension. More information can be found in the [main Polyfill README](https://github.com/symfony/polyfill/blob/main/README.md). License ======= This library is released under the [MIT license](LICENSE).
